reasoning: We are forecasting on November 23, 2025. Box Office Mojo reports that the highest grossing movie of 2025 worldwide is "Ne Zha 2", a sequel, with over $2.2 billion in revenue. The #2 is Zootopia 2 ($1.86B) and #3 is Avatar 3 ($1.48B), both well-established franchises. The #9 movie is currently the highest non-franchise film at barely $634M. Given that there are essentially 5 weeks left in the year, and "Ne Zha 2" has set such an insurmountable lead with a massive $2.2+ billion haul, it is statistically impossible for a non-franchise film to suddenly release, make $2.3B, and take the #1 spot before Dec 31, 2025. Thus, the top grossing movie of 2025 will certainly be a franchise movie.
